content_blocks.text:
বাংলাদেশ গেজেট, অতিরিক্ত, জুন ৩০, ২০১৩ ৪৯৬৩
(a) When executed for the sole purpose of procuring the registration of one or more document in relation to a single transaction or for admitting execution of one or more such documents; Five hundred
Taka
(b) When executed for the purpose of the section 2, clause (7), of the power of Attorney Act, 2012; One thousand
Taka
(c) When power of attorney given by a loanee while obtaining loans, advances or any other credit facilities from any scheduled bank or financial institution empowering such bank or institution to realise the loan amount from him, in the event of default by him, by selling his immovable property; and One thousand
Taka
**Explanation**—“In this clause— - (i) “Financial institution” means the Bangladesh Shilpa Bank established by the Bangladesh Shilpa Bank Order, 1972 (President’s Order No. 129 of 1972), the
content_blocks.stitching_note: Continuation of the clause detailing the replacement text for Article No. 48.

output_carry_forward_state.active_clause_summary: Amends Schedule I and Article No. 48 of the Stamp Act, 1899, detailing the replacement text for Article No. 48.
output_carry_forward_state.continuation_hint_for_next_chunk: The clause (3) continues into the next page, detailing the remaining definitions and the next article replacement.

recent_clause_history.summary: Amends section 2 of the Stamp Act, 1899, defining 'Power of Attorney'.
Amends Schedule I and Article No. 48 of the Stamp Act, 1899.
